Class GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt.DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.model.tool.DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.google.genai.GoogleGenAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.google.genai.GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, ChatOptions.Builder<GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder>, StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder<GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder>, ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder>
Enclosing class:
GoogleGenAiChatOptions
public static class GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder extends GoogleGenAiChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<GoogleGenAiChatOptions.Builder>
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Grogdunn, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, Soby Chacko, Dan Dobrin, Sebastien Deleuze
